title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · Durable Agent Mission
summary: An internal operations team. The team needs bounded retries, idempotent effects, compensation, and restart safety under injected failures. Planned artifact: Deliver Fault-Tolerant Tool Loop with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Record intended and observed side effects for idempotency and audit.
Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
